OUR SERVICES

Everything You Need
Under One Roof

From forklift sales to complete warehouse solutions, we've got you covered with professional service and expertise.

OSHA Compliance

Full safety inspections, operator training, and compliance documentation. Keep your warehouse up to code.

Safety InspectionsOperator TrainingDocumentationAnnual Audits

Wire-guided Systems

Precision wire-guided forklift technology for high-density racking. Maximize your warehouse efficiency.

Indoor NavigationPrecision PickingAuto SteeringTraffic Management

Racking Solutions

Custom warehouse racking installation and redesign. Selective, push-back, drive-in, and pallet flow systems.

Custom DesignInstallationPermit HandlingExpansion Plans

WHY US

The Material Solutions
Difference

Certified Quality

Every unit undergoes 50-point inspection. Full warranty and certification included.

Fast Delivery

Same-day delivery available. Most units ready to go within 48 hours of purchase.

Expert Support

David AI plus real human support. We're with you before, during, and after the sale.

GET IN TOUCH

Ready to Upgrade
Your Fleet?

Whether you need a single pallet jack or a complete warehouse overhaul, we're here to help. David AI is standing by to assist you right now.
